title: phyllagathis gracilis
intro: Phyllagathis gracilis, also known as the fragrant phyllagathis, is a small shrub species native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds like borneol and camphor, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phyllagathis gracilis include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Phyllagathis gracilis are often in the form of essential oil, tea, or infusions, which can be used topically or ingested under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
